name: Salmon Vina Olki (Portuguese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients in a large kettle and stir well.
2. Add salmon slices and stir well so each slice will absorb the spices and garlic.
3. Leave in brine overnight, but not longer than 24 hours, as salmon tends to get mushy.
4. Remove from brine, roll in cracker crumbs or meal.
5. Fry in hot oil.
Note: Pork chops are delicious prepared the same way, with the exception that you leave them in the brine 24 hours or longer.
